name_en: Nappa patent lambskin mini bag~Matte Black
name_cn:
Nappa patent lambskin mini bag~Matte Black
This Nappa patent lambskin is known for its soft texture. An adjustable shoulder strap adds practical detail, while the embossed letter logo showcases classic style.
~Zip closure
~Hook clasp shoulder strap
~Lined
~Metal letter logo
Size: W18.5×H14×D10cm
No.: 5NE841
